items.name: ❄️「Frostveil Coat [PBR]」❄️
items.description:
A luxurious long coat wrapped in soft fur trim, designed to keep you warm in the harshest of winters.
The flowing silhouette and plush textures create a balance of elegance and coziness — perfect for icy kingdoms, magical adventures, or winter fashion statements.
✨ Features
Long robe-style coat with fur-lined cuffs and collar
Elegant and cozy PBR texture work
Perfect for fantasy, RPG, or seasonal outfits
Adds a regal, wintery flair to your avatar
🔍 Keywords: winter coat, fur trim, fantasy, elegant, snow, PBR
